check_interval_sec.description: Time interval, in seconds, between consecutive health checks; must be greater than zero.

description.description: Specifies an optional description for the HTTP health check resource, providing additional context or purpose for its use.

healthy_threshold.description: Number of consecutive successful health checks required for an instance to be considered healthy.

host.description: Hostname used for HTTP health check requests, typically resolving to the IP address of the target resource; must be a valid domain name or IP.

name.description: Defines the name of the HTTP health check resource, which must be unique within the project.

port.description: The port number on which the health check requests will be sent; must be a valid TCP port.

request_path.description: Path to which the HTTP health check request is sent; must begin with a forward slash (e.g., "/health").

timeout_sec.description: Duration in seconds to wait for a response before marking the health check as failed; must be between 1 and 300.

timeouts.description: Configures the timeout settings for the health check, specifying the maximum amount of time to wait for a response before marking the check as failed.

unhealthy_threshold.description: Specifies the number of consecutive failed health checks required to mark the instance as unhealthy. Must be a positive integer.
